title: Sidelink feedback channel
abstract: A first wireless device receives or transmits one or more sidelink signals scheduling physical sidelink feedback channels (PSFCHs) via a PSFCH transmission occasion. The PSFCHs comprise: one or more first PSFCHs comprising sidelink beam information; and one or more second PSFCHs comprising sidelink conflict information. The first wireless device determines, from the PSFCHs, a quantity of one or more PSFCHs for a simultaneous transmission via the PSFCH transmission occasion. Determination of the quantity of one or more PSFCHs is based on a PSFCH transmission, comprising sidelink beam information, being prioritized over a PSFCH transmission comprising sidelink conflict information. The first wireless device transmits, via the PSFCH transmission occasion, the one or more PSFCHs.
claims:
Claims Docket No.: 23-1151PCT CLAIMS What is claimed is: 1. A method comprising: receiving or transmitting, by a first wireless device, one or more sidelink signals scheduling physical sidelink feedback channels (PSFCHs) via a PSFCH transmission occasion, wherein the PSFCHs comprise: one or more first PSFCHs comprising sidelink beam information; and one or more second PSFCHs comprising sidelink conflict information; determining, from the PSFCHs, a quantity of one or more PSFCHs for a simultaneous transmission via the PSFCH transmission occasion, wherein the determining is based on a PSFCH transmission, comprising sidelink beam information, being prioritized over a PSFCH transmission comprising sidelink conflict information; and transmitting, via the PSFCH transmission occasion, the one or more PSFCHs. 2. A method comprising: receiving or transmitting, by a first wireless device, one or more sidelink signals associated with physical sidelink feedback channels (PSFCHs) scheduled for simultaneous transmission via a PSFCH transmission occasion; determining, among the PSFCHs and for a simultaneous transmission, one or more first PSFCHs comprising sidelink beam information; in response to the determining the one or more first PSFCHs, determining, among the PSFCHs and for the simultaneous transmission, one or more second PSFCHs comprising sidelink conflict information; and transmitting, via the PSFCH transmission occasion, the one or more first PSFCHs and the one or more second PSFCHs. 3. A method comprising: transmitting, by a wireless device, one or more physical sidelink feedback channels (PSFCHs) from PSFCHs scheduled for a simultaneous transmission via a PSFCH transmission occasion, wherein a first PSFCH of the PSFCHs comprises sidelink beam information. 4. The method of any one of claims 1-3, further comprising receiving or transmitting, by a first wireless device, one or more sidelink signals associated with the PSFCHs scheduled for the simultaneous transmission via the PSFCH transmission occasion. 5. The method of claim 4, wherein at least one sidelink signal of the one or more sidelink signals comprises at least one of: sidelink control information (SCI); a sidelink medium access control (MAC) control element (CE); a radio resource control (RRC) message; a sidelink RRC message; or system information block. 

Docket No.: 23-1151PCT 6. The method of any one of claims 4-5, wherein the one or more sidelink signals indicate, schedule, initiate, or trigger the transmissions of at least one of the PSFCHs via the PSFCH transmission occasion. 7. The method of any one of claims 1-6, wherein a second PSFCH of the PSFCHs comprises control information. 8. The method of any one of claims 1-7, wherein a third PSFCH of the PSFCHs comprises sidelink HARQ feedback information. 9. The method of any one of claims 1-8, wherein the PSFCHs comprises at least one of: the first PSFCH; a second PSFCH comprising comprise control information; or a third PSFCH comprising sidelink HARQ feedback information. 10. The method of any one of claims 1-9, wherein the PSFCHs comprise at least one of: the one or more first PSFCHs, each of the one or more first PSFCHs comprising sidelink beam information; the one or more second PSFCHs, each of the one or more second PSFCHs comprising sidelink conflict information; or the one or more third PSFCHs, each of the one or more third PSFCHs comprising HARQ feedback information. 11. The method of any one of claims 1-10, further comprising: determining, among the PSFCHs and for the simultaneous transmission, the one or more first PSFCHs comprising sidelink beam information. 12. The method of claim 11, wherein the determining the one or more first PSFCHs comprises determining to include the one or more first PSFCHs to the one or more PSFCHs for the simultaneous transmission via the PSFCH transmission occasion. 13. The method of any one of claims 1-12, further comprising: determining, among the PSFCHs and for the simultaneous transmission, the one or more second PSFCHs comprising sidelink conflict information. 14. The method of claim 13, wherein the determining the one or more second PSFCHs comprises determining to include the one or more second PSFCHs to the one or more PSFCHs for the simultaneous transmission via the PSFCH transmission occasion. 15. The method of any one of claims 1-14, further comprising: determining, among the PSFCHs and for the simultaneous transmission, the one or more third PSFCHs comprising sidelink HARQ feedback information. 16. The method of claim 15, wherein the determining the one or more third PSFCHs comprises determining to include the one or more third PSFCHs to the one or more PSFCHs for the simultaneous transmission via the PSFCH transmission occasion. 17. The method of any one of claims 1-16, further comprising: in response to or after the determining the one or more first PSFCHs, determining, among the PSFCHs and for the simultaneous transmission, the one or more second PSFCHs comprising sidelink conflict information. 

Docket No.: 23-1151PCT 18. The method of any one of claims 1-17, further comprising: in response to the determining the one or more first PSFCHs, determining, among the PSFCHs and for the simultaneous transmission, the one or more third PSFCHs comprising sidelink HARQ feedback information. 19. The method of any one of claims 1-18, further comprising: in response to the determining the one or more second PSFCHs, determining, among the PSFCHs and for the simultaneous transmission, the one or more first PSFCHs comprising sidelink beam information. 20. The method of any one of claims 1-19, further comprising: in response to the determining the one or more second PSFCHs, determining, among the PSFCHs and for the simultaneous transmission, the one or more third PSFCHs comprising sidelink HARQ feedback information. 21. The method of any one of claims 1-20, further comprising: in response to the determining the one or more third PSFCHs, determining, among the PSFCHs and for the simultaneous transmission, the one or more first PSFCHs comprising sidelink beam information. 22. The method of any one of claims 1-21, further comprising: in response to the determining the one or more third PSFCHs, determining, among the PSFCHs and for the simultaneous transmission, the one or more second PSFCHs comprising sidelink conflict information. 23. The method of any one of claims 1-22, wherein determining, among the PSFCHs and for the simultaneous transmission, the one or more first PSFCHs comprising sidelink beam information is based on a PSFCH transmission, comprising sidelink beam information, being prioritized over a PSFCH transmission comprising sidelink conflict information. 24. The method of any one of claims 1-23, wherein determining, among the PSFCHs and for the simultaneous transmission, the one or more first PSFCHs comprising sidelink beam information is based on a PSFCH transmission, comprising sidelink conflict information, being prioritized over a PSFCH transmission comprising sidelink beam information. 25. The method of any one of claims 1-24, wherein determining, among the PSFCHs and for the simultaneous transmission, the one or more first PSFCHs comprising sidelink beam information is based on a PSFCH transmission, comprising sidelink HARQ feedback information, being prioritized over a PSFCH transmission comprising sidelink beam information. 26. The method of any one of claims 1-25, wherein determining, among the PSFCHs and for the simultaneous transmission, the one or more first PSFCHs comprising sidelink beam information is based on a PSFCH transmission, comprising sidelink beam information, being prioritized over a PSFCH transmission comprising sidelink HARQ feedback information. 27. The method of any one of claims 1-26, wherein determining, among the PSFCHs and for the simultaneous transmission, the one or more second PSFCHs comprising sidelink conflict information is based on a PSFCH transmission, comprising sidelink beam information, being prioritized over a PSFCH transmission comprising sidelink conflict information. 

Docket No.: 23-1151PCT 28. The method of any one of claims 1-27, wherein determining, among the PSFCHs and for the simultaneous transmission, the one or more second PSFCHs comprising sidelink conflict information is based on a PSFCH transmission, comprising sidelink conflict information, being prioritized over a PSFCH transmission comprising sidelink beam information. 29. The method of any one of claims 1-28, wherein determining, among the PSFCHs and for the simultaneous transmission, the one or more second PSFCHs comprising sidelink conflict information is based on a PSFCH transmission, comprising sidelink HARQ feedback information, being prioritized over a PSFCH transmission comprising sidelink conflict information. 30. The method of any one of claims 1-29, wherein determining, among the PSFCHs and for the simultaneous transmission, the one or more second PSFCHs comprising sidelink conflict information is based on a PSFCH transmission, comprising sidelink conflict information, being prioritized over a PSFCH transmission comprising sidelink HARQ feedback information. 31. The method of any one of claims 1-30, wherein determining, among the PSFCHs and for the simultaneous transmission, the one or more third PSFCHs comprising sidelink HARQ feedback information is based on a PSFCH transmission, comprising sidelink HARQ feedback information, being prioritized over a PSFCH transmission comprising sidelink conflict information. 32. The method of any one of claims 1-31, wherein determining, among the PSFCHs and for the simultaneous transmission, the one or more third PSFCHs comprising sidelink HARQ feedback information is based on a PSFCH transmission, comprising sidelink conflict information, being prioritized over a PSFCH transmission comprising sidelink HARQ feedback information. 33. The method of any one of claims 1-32, wherein determining, among the PSFCHs and for the simultaneous transmission, the one or more third PSFCHs comprising sidelink HARQ feedback information is based on a PSFCH transmission, comprising sidelink HARQ feedback information, being prioritized over a PSFCH transmission comprising sidelink beam information. 34. The method of any one of claims 1-33, wherein determining, among the PSFCHs and for the simultaneous transmission, the one or more third PSFCHs comprising sidelink HARQ feedback information is based on a PSFCH transmission, comprising sidelink beam information, being prioritized over a PSFCH transmission comprising sidelink HARQ feedback information. 35. The method of claim 34, further comprising determining, from the PSFCHs, a quantity of the one or more PSFCHs for the simultaneous transmission via the PSFCH transmission occasion. 36. The method of any one of claims 1-35 wherein a quantity of the one or more PSFCHs is a sum of at least one of: a first quantity of the one or more first PSFCHs; a second quantity of the one or more second PSFCHs; or a third quantity of the one or more third PSFCHs. 

Docket No.: 23-1151PCT 37. The method of any one of claims 1-36, wherein the determining the one or more first PSFCHs comprising beam information comprises determining the first quantity of the one or more first PSFCHs. 38. The method of any one of claims 1-37, wherein the determining the one or more second PSFCHs comprising sidelink conflict information comprises determining the second quantity of the one or more second PSFCHs. 39. The method of any one of claims 1-38, wherein the determining the one or more third PSFCHs comprising HARQ feedback information comprises determining the third quantity of the one or more third PSFCHs. 40. The method of any one of claims 1-39, wherein the transmitting the one or more PSFCHs comprises transmitting, by a wireless device and via the PSFCH transmission occasion, the simultaneous transmission of the one or more PSFCHs. 41. The method of any one of claims 1-40, wherein the beam information comprises at least one of: sidelink beam report; sidelink beam indication; sidelink beam measurement report; or sidelink beam failure indication. 42. The method of any one of claims 1-41, wherein the beam information comprises a first field indicating a sidelink reference signal. 43. The method of claim 42, wherein the sidelink reference signal indicates at least one of: a sidelink beam; a candidate sidelink beam; a preferred sidelink beam; a sidelink transmission configuration indication (TCI) state; or a sidelink transmission spatial filter. 44. The method of any one of claims 1-43, wherein the beam information comprises a second field indicating a measurement quantity of a sidelink reference signal. 45. The method of claim 44, the measurement quantity comprises at least one of: reference signal received power (RSRP); or reference signal received quality (RSRQ). 46. The method of any one of claims 1-45, wherein the beam information comprises a third field indicating a sidelink beam failure. 47. The method of any one of claims 1-46, wherein the beam information comprises a third field indicating at least one of: a sidelink beam failure; a sidelink beam failure detection; or a request of a sidelink beam failure recovery. 

Docket No.: 23-1151PCT 48. The method of any one of claims 1-47, wherein the conflict information indicates a sidelink resource conflict of a sidelink resource. 49. The method of claim 48, wherein an index of a PSFCH resource that the wireless device transmits a PSFCH comprising conflict information via the PSFCH transmission occasion is associated with the sidelink resource. 50. The method of Claim 48, wherein an index of a PSFCH resource that is associated with the sidelink resource is based on one or more parameters. 51. The method of claim 50, wherein the one or more sidelink signal comprises the one more parameters. 52. The method of claim 51, wherein the one or more sidelink signal comprising the one more parameters indicates a sidelink transmission scheduled on the sidelink resource. 53. The method of claim 51, wherein the one or more parameters comprise at least one of: a source wireless device identifier; a destination wireless device identifier; or a cast type. 54. The method of any one of claims 1-53, wherein the HARQ feedback information comprises a positive acknowledgement (ACK) or a negative ACK (NACK). 55. The method of claim 50, wherein one of the one or more sidelink signal comprises: scheduling information of a PSSCH that the wireless device receives; and an HARQ feedback enabling indicator indicating the wireless device transmits the HARQ feedback information on the PSSCH. 56. A method comprising: transmitting, by a base station to a wireless device, configuration parameters, of sidelink feedback channel (PSFCH), that the wireless device uses for determining, from PSFCHs scheduled via a PSFCH transmission occasion, one or more PSFCHs for simultaneous transmission, wherein a first PSFCH of the PSFCHs comprise sidelink beam information. 57. A method comprising: receiving, by a second wireless device from a wireless device, one or more physical sidelink feedback channels (PSFCHs) that the wireless device determines, from PSFCHs scheduled via a PSFCH transmission occasion, wherein a first PSFCH of the PSFCHs comprise sidelink beam information. 58. An apparatus comprising: one or more processors; and memory storing instructions that, when executed by the one or more processors, cause the apparatus to perform the method of any one of claims 1-57. 59. A non-transitory computer-readable medium comprising instructions that, when executed by one or more processors of an apparatus, cause the apparatus to perform the method of any one of claims 1-57.
